title: Open edX Design System Component Schema
description: JSON Schema for component metadata in the Open edX design system registry. Used to define component properties, source location, status, and accessibility information.

name.description: Component name in PascalCase. Examples: Button, CourseCard, DashboardLayout.

atomicLevel.description: Atomic design level of the component. See atomic-design-taxonomy.md for definitions.

status.description: Maturity status of the component. 'stable' = production-ready; 'experimental' = may change; 'deprecated' = do not use in new code.

sourceMfe.description: Repository slug without org prefix. Examples: 'frontend-app-learning', 'paragon', 'frontend-base'.

sourceRepo.description: Full GitHub repository slug in format 'org/repo'. Examples: 'openedx/frontend-app-learning', 'openedx/paragon'.

sourcePath.description: Path to component source file or directory within the source repository. Examples: 'src/Button/Button.tsx', 'src/containers/CourseCard/index.jsx'.

version.description: Semantic version of the component (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). Examples: '1.0.0', '2.1.3-beta.1'.

figmaCodeConnectUrl.description: Optional Figma Code Connect URL linking design to code. Examples: 'https://figma.com/design/...?nodeId=123:456'. Null if not yet connected.

consumers.description: Array of repository slugs (without org prefix) that depend on or consume this component. Examples: ['frontend-app-learning', 'frontend-app-authoring']. Empty array if no known consumers.

a11y.description: Accessibility conformance level. 'A' = minimal WCAG conformance; 'AA' = standard; 'AAA' = enhanced; 'unknown' = not yet assessed.

lastIngested.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent metadata ingestion. Used to track freshness of registry data. Examples: '2026-05-19T14:30:00Z'.
